name: Product Photography
description: Clean commercial product photography with controlled studio lighting.
prompt_prefix: professional product photography, commercial advertising image, clean composition, controlled studio lighting, realistic materials
prompt_suffix: sharp focus, highly detailed, accurate reflections, premium presentation, high-end advertising
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted product, incorrect geometry, duplicate objects, cluttered background, harsh shadows, overexposed, underexposed, text, watermark, logo
